# Akhmad Qasim

> Personal portfolio of Akhmad Qasim - a Software Developer from Indonesia specializing in backend systems and iOS development. This site also hosts legal documentation (Privacy Policy and Privacy Rights) for the SIMSDIG school management platform.

Akhmad Qasim is a Backend & iOS Developer who builds scalable server architectures, native mobile experiences, and school management systems for Indonesian educational institutions. The site is built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

## Pages

- [Home](https://akhmadqasim.com): Landing page with introduction, skills overview, network infrastructure tools, and project showcase
- [Skills](https://akhmadqasim.com/skills): Detailed skills in Backend Development (TypeScript, Python, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis), DevOps (Docker, GitHub Actions, Grafana, Sentry), System Architecture, and iOS Development (Swift, SwiftUI)
- [Projects](https://akhmadqasim.com/projects): Portfolio of built projects

## Projects

- [Chemist Fun Days](https://chemistfundays.id): Full-stack platform for a national chemistry competition - event landing page with competition details, sponsor showcase, and registration flow
- [CFD Dashboard](https://dashboard.chemistfundays.id): Participant dashboard for Chemist Fun Days - authentication, registration management, and competition tracking
- [SIMS SMAN 1 Samarinda](https://sims.sman1samarinda.sch.id): School management information system for one of the top high schools in East Kalimantan - student data, academic records, and administrative tools
